questions: What is Google Ads Quality Score and why does it matter?
How can we improve Quality Score?
qa.answer: Quality Score estimates ad and landing page quality versus peers. Higher scores reduce CPCs and improve ad rank. Drivers include expected CTR, ad relevance, and landing page experience.
implication: Tighten keyword‑ad‑landing page alignment; use SKAG‑like intent clusters.
Improve landing speed and relevance; optimize headlines and CTAs.
Prune low‑QS terms or split into more targeted ad groups.
